title: *How to Win a Trade War: An Optimistic Guide to an Anxious Global Economy*
subtitle: That is the new Soumaya Keynes book, out today. I was happy to have blurbed this book, and here is an essay, on export restrictions, based on the book. The post *How to Win a Trade War: An Optimistic Guide to an Anxious Global Economy* appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
That is the new Soumaya Keynes book, out today.  I was happy to have blurbed this book, and here is an essay, on export restrictions, based on the book.

The post *How to Win a Trade War: An Optimistic Guide to an Anxious Global Economy* appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION.
